creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:

07, addr 2> on usbus6

7, addr 2> on usbus6                                                            
ums2: 31 buttons and [XYZ] coordinates ID=5

07, addr 2> on usbus6                                                           
device_attach: uhid2 attach returned 12
